name: Mauritius Mass Finder v24.8
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Near Me ranking fix: typed phrases such as près de moi and near me now trigger geolocation mode, location-unavailable states are non-misleading, and nearby results rank by soonest upcoming Mass first, then distance.
